channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:
Bags appeared this week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danecroft Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Street light not working very dark, 23rd April
item.description:
Light not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastry Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Durfey Place, 23rd April
item.description:
Flytipping in Durfey Place remains a constant issue. I have already raised this within several complaints. It is now happening almost every day, and it continues to have a real impact on residents. Ms Sophia Opoku-Addo, Resident Services Officer for this area, never replied to any emails about the issue and the working group set up by her predecessor. This is simply unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durfey Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in alley way, 23rd April
item.description:
There are graffiti in alley way. Does not look nice.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Light Timing has changed resulting in long queues on Long Lane, 23rd April
item.description:
The traffic light timing has recently changed, which has resulted in long queues on Long Lane, RM16 2PJ. This has resulted in driveways being blocked for up to 5 minutes. There is no traffic on the roundabout which impacts the traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, Stifford Clays, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic signal pole leaning dangerously, 23rd April
item.description:
Traffic signal pole leaning dangerously

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Lever Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Stressed tree end of our garden in crease park at risk of dying and insurance risk to us, 23rd April
item.description:
Reported several times on last 2 years. You have refused to come out. We think this tree is treatable and definitely needs pruning at least. Bark peeling off. Large tree behind [your address/location] showing progressive crown dieback since summer 2021 (heatwave) * Significant deadwood visible throughout canopy * Sparse, patchy leafing compared to adjacent trees * Evidence of branch dieback and stress regrowth (epicormic shoots) Risk: * Dead branches are overhanging my garden * Concern about falling limbs, particularly in windy conditions * Garden is regularly used, increasing risk if debris falls Request: * Inspection by council arborist * Removal of deadwood for safety * Confirmation of last inspection date and risk assessment Photos show healthy trees either side. This tree has been unhealthy since the heatwave around 2021/2022. Without treatment it will die and become weak. Size now extends our insurance should the fall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Crossways Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped stool, 23rd April
item.description:
Next to hedge away from Sainsbury’s

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Dumped car, with damage to handle and paint., 23rd April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whinyates Road, Eltham

item.title: Kerb on road, 23rd April

The tree is falling and the kerb has been dislodged onto the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haredon Close, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Bins outside the building, 23rd April
item.description:
The waste from bins outside the building have been emptied onto the street. This is an ongoing issue, and is a hygiene and safety issue. Can this please be cleaned as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Street bin needs emptying

item.title: Fly tipping around same tree again, 23rd April
item.description:
Everytime the council removes a load of junk from this area, someone tips here again immediately. Please can some cameras be installed to catch/deter them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor quality planting in trough on Red Hill nr Victoria Road, 23rd April
item.description:
The planted trough looks really sad. Could we please have some additional plants and also it desperately needs watering please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
